security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; img-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost data:; media-src 'self' asset: http://asset.localhost; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'self'; frame-ancestors 'none'
